segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm planning a trip to visit my aunt during spring break. What maintenance should I do on my car? Make sure to check the tire pressure and oil level. It's also a good idea to have your car inspected by a mechanic before you go. That's helpful. Can you recommend a mechanic? There's one on Street across from the grocery store. I'll give you a link to book an appointment. Thanks. I'll take care of that right away.
